mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in FEDFUNDS relative to recent months signals easier policy and a lower expected policy path, which reduces the 10-year yield over the next 20 trading days as markets price a slower hiking stance and weaker term premium.
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS declines or stays flat but the 10-year yield rises in the following 20 trading days in most triggered observations, or if the sign hit rate falls below 40% over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL accelerates above its recent trend while FEDFUNDS is still below the implied inflation pressure, Treasury markets reprice tighter future policy and higher term premium, pushing the 10-year yield upward over the next month.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change rises above 3.0% while FEDFUNDS remains below 5.0%
regime_hint: disinflation reversal after an easing pause
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-FEDFUNDS spread widens by the trigger condition yet the 10-year yield falls in more than 60% of matched 20-day windows, or if average forward yield change is negative.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE above its recent level signals weakening labor demand and slower growth, which lowers expected real rates and pushes the 10-year yield down over the following 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.2pp from its prior 3-month average
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE rises by the stated threshold but the 10-year yield increases in a majority of 20-day forward windows, or if the conditional mean yield change is not below zero.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous slowdown in RSAFS and HOUST indicates demand compression in consumption and housing, which lowers growth expectations and reduces the 10-year yield over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if combined declines in RSAFS and HOUST do not precede lower 10-year yields in at least 55% of 20-day windows, or if the interaction term adds no predictive value versus single-series effects.

mechanism_narrative: A broad rise in INDPRO indicates stronger industrial activity and cyclical momentum, which lifts real-rate expectations and pushes the 10-year yield higher over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 1-month change turns positive after two consecutive weak months
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO inflections are followed by flat or lower 10-year yields in most 5-day windows, or if the hit rate remains below 45% across rolling samples.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-shock recovery, improving PAYEMS together with falling UNRATE signals stronger labor income and demand, which steepens growth expectations and raises the 10-year yield over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average accelerates while UNRATE declines by at least 0.2pp
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-down condition fails to produce higher 10-year yields over 60-day horizons, or if the sign agreement is below 60% in recovery episodes.

mechanism_narrative: In a tightening cycle, a flat-to-rising FEDFUNDS combined with sticky CPIAUCSL keeps real policy restrictive and preserves upward pressure on the 10-year yield over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS is unchanged or higher versus the prior month and CPIAUCSL inflation remains above 3% annualized
failure_condition: Reject if restrictive FEDFUNDS with sticky CPIAUCSL is not followed by higher 10-year yields in at least 55% of matched windows, or if the average forward yield change is nonpositive.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 growth decelerates while RSAFS and PAYEMS also soften, the market infers a synchronized demand slowdown and prices a lower path for long rates, causing the 10-year yield to fall over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 annualized growth falls below its prior year pace and both RSAFS and PAYEMS are below their 3-month averages
failure_condition: Reject if the synchronized GDP-sales-payroll slowdown does not precede lower 10-year yields over 60-day windows, or if conditional forecast accuracy is indistinguishable from unconditional baseline.
